title: scolymocephalus echinulatus
intro: Scolymocephalus echinulatus is a plant species known for its unique appearance and medicinal properties. The plant is also known as the "hedgehog fruit" due to its spiky, echinocarpous fruit, which contains seeds covered in small, barbed spines. Scolymocephalus echinulatus has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, and is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and pain, as well as aiding in digestion and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Scolymocephalus echinulatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
